description: Equality-with-constant narrowing: req.query.pathname compared against string literals produces a boolean; the ternary selects between two static HTML strings, so the innerHTML/res.send receives only attacker-independent content. Should NOT fire taint-unsanitised-flow.

expected.notes: boolean result of `pathname === '/login'` carries no taint; ternary branches are static literals; banner is clean at res.send
